title: Radial Hotbar
body:
The mod changes your hotbar to a circular window.

open a window - middle mouse button
select an item in your main hand - left mouse button
select an item in the other hand - right mouse button

The center shows the items in your hands; left-clicking on an item in this location removes them to a free slot in the hotbar.

**This mod was created with the support of Minecraft hosting minely.net**
